paper.title: Experimental performances of RC beams strengthened with FRP materials
paper.material_system: reinforced concrete beams with FRP strengthening
paper.notes: RC beam paper reports only mean concrete cube strength 33.6 MPa; no cement/concrete mixture proportions or mixture-level strength series are extractable.
